statement: In every magma, Equation 3126 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * y) * x`) implies Equation 3962 (`x * y = (y * (y * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0460
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) y) x)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op y x)) y)
